claim: SP2 integration defect fix: _prepare_candidate_root builds the candidate from the TRACKED TREE (git ls-files --stage -z) instead of full-checkout copytree; preserves symlink index entries as links; fails closed on gitlinks and unsafe paths; seeds declared untracked reads (workspace docs_tmp) beside the candidate; binds BB_WORKSPACE_ROOT to candidate_root.parent
root_cause_fixed: canonical fixed-point regen at integration head failed in _prepare_candidate_root: shutil.copytree over full checkout hit dangling golden symlink (misc/codex_cli_runs/goldens) and copied stale .venv_linux_import_20260618; see docs_tmp/phase_20/evidence/M1/integration_fixed_point_gate.json

test_evidence.note: post-park rerun at exact parked head 9df0ae4a including final BB_WORKSPACE_ROOT binding lines

test_evidence.tail: ReferenceResolutionError: BB_WORKSPACE_ROOT is required for workspace evidence references
test_evidence.note: demonstrates fail-closed workspace-reference behavior at import time

park_context: committed at park order before final rerun; see docs_tmp/phase_20/evidence/M1/p20_park_record.json
revision_2_note: Re-review response to ReviewSP2b changes_requested (both P2 blockers): replaced working-tree copy with index-backed materialization. _tracked_checkout_paths now retains object IDs; _copy_tracked_checkout writes blob bytes via `git cat-file blob <oid>` (regenerate_evidence.py:995-1041). This removes all three defect vectors structurally: (1) tracked entry missing from checkout cannot be silently skipped - candidate content comes from the index, not the worktree; (2) tracked file shadowed by an untracked directory cannot leak descendants - only the indexed blob is written; (3) a symlinked parent cannot traverse outside ROOT - cat-file reads the object store. 120000 entries keep the scratch-workspace escape check; 100755 restores the executable bit; 160000 still fails closed. Regression tests: checkout-file-deleted (incl. exec bit), untracked-directory-shadowing, symlinked-parent-traversal; escape test now uses a real git index instead of a stub.
